title: Earth Globe Partner Markets
scene_prompt: Cinematic photograph of planet Earth from space against pure black void. The globe is centered and fills approximately 60% of the frame, showing Africa, the Middle East, and parts of South America and Europe clearly visible — the regions where infrastructure is being reimagined. The Earth is rendered with photorealistic detail: deep ocean blues, green-brown landmasses, wispy white cloud formations, and the thin bright blue line of the atmosphere at the terminator. The sun illuminates from the upper left, creating a dramatic day/night terminator across Eastern Africa. City lights are faintly visible on the night side. The overall feeling is contemplative and documentary — this is our planet, the actual operating environment. The black space background is clean with no stars, emphasizing the solitary beauty of Earth. Shot as if photographed from a low-orbit satellite with a medium telephoto lens. Color palette is natural but with shadows pushed slightly toward forest green (#0f4c3a) and the deepest ocean areas reading as Intelligence Navy (#0A1128). The atmosphere's edge catches a hint of Cyber Emerald (#00D1B2). Film grain visible. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no UI elements, no overlays, no AI-generated artifacts.
palette: Forest Green ocean shadows + Intelligence Navy deep space + natural Earth tones
composition: Centered globe at 60% frame fill, black void background, sun from upper left illuminating Africa and Middle East prominently.
